goals: Store initial research findings and sources for the history paper
Search for previously stored information to recall relevant facts
Review all stored memories to assess research progress
Delete irrelevant or incorrect stored information

user_agent_config.personality: Methodical and organized, focused on completing assignments efficiently. Uses tools pragmatically to support academic work.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Familiar with basic research methods and note-taking but does not know internal tool names or APIs. Understands the concept of storing and retrieving information but learns the specific interface through interaction.

end_condition: The student has stored their initial research, successfully retrieved relevant past information, reviewed their research progress, and cleaned up any irrelevant memories.
